title: [Flink 0.10.2 Released](</2016/02/11/flink-0.10.2-released/>)
summary:
#  Flink 0.10.2 Released
February 11, 2016 -
Today, the Flink community released Flink version **0.10.2** , the second bugfix release of the 0.10 series.
We **recommend all users updating to this release** by bumping the version of your Fli…
